history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. I need to avoid lava and look for a safe route around it. Turning downward will let me go to row 03 column B, which is a safe floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead, row 03 column B, is safe floor, so the best next move is to advance forward toward the lower path leading around the lava wall.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe floor, so I should continue forward toward the open lower corridor.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is safe floor, and moving forward keeps me on the path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 05 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 06 column B is safe floor, so I should continue forward toward the open corridor leading to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 07 column B is safe floor, so I should keep moving forward to advance toward the lower corridor and then the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 07 column B facing down, but the cell ahead at row 08 column B is safe and moving down will take me toward the open path leading to the goal at row 08 column H. So I should continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing down, and the goal is to my right on row 08 column H. To move toward it safely, I need to face right. From facing down, turning counter-clockwise will make me face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing right, and the goal is on row 08 column H. The path to the right through columns C to G is clear, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 08 column C facing right. The goal is still to the right at row 08 column H, and the cells ahead are safe floor cells. I should keep moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column D facing right. The goal is still to the right at row 08 column H, and the next cell row 08 column E is safe floor. I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 08 column E facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H, and the path ahead through F and G is clear floor, so I should continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column F facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H, and the next cell G is safe, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column G facing right. The goal is immediately ahead at row 08 column H, so moving forward is safe and reaches the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
